source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #67
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. Star Atlas Town Hall #40 – R2.1 Patch Updates, DAO Updates and Destination
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
Star Atlas Town Hall #40 – R2.1 Patch Updates, DAO Updates and Destination Starbase
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of the Star Atlas Townhall #40.
STAR ATLAS Town Hall Recap With Patch Notes & DAO Proposals
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video recapping the Star Atlas Townhall.
Star Atlas Recap News June 23 2023
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping the past week of Star Atlas News.
Star Atlas Chatter #2 – Bring out the IMP! Week in Review 6/16 – 6/23 2023
RahMega posted a video reviewing the week of Star Atlas news.
Metaverse Nomads #100 Star Atlas w/ Michael Wagner and Chypto
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
Star Atlas Race Track Challenge
Beyond the Horizon posted a video showing the Star Atlas race course.
Star Atlas REC New Crafting Meta
The Hologram News Network posted a video of news about Star Atlas crafting.
Star Atlas Data YOU REALLY NEED TO SEE Are We Creating a bubble?
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about Star Atlas data analysis.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #85
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
All 12 Factions and their Alignments. – STAR ATLAS Lore of ECOS beginnings Revealed!!!
Gladiator posted a video of Star Atlas lore.
Star Atlas Race Track Challenge with THE COPILOT
Beyond The Horizon posted a video of running the Star Atlas race track.
The Star Atlas Bot Crackdown
The Hologram published a video about a bot crackdown in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas : PIP-X The First Player Initiated DAO Proposal
PockThePirate posted a video interview with Signal.
STAR ATLAS – NEW SHIP SPECS OVERHAULED
The Club posted a video looking at the Star Atlas Lore Wiki.
Exploring the Star Atlas Showroom: Little Secrets
The Hologram published an article about secrets in the Star Atlas Showroom.
You are not going to want to hear this.
Gladiator posted a video of his reactions to Star Atlas DAO proposals.
Destination Starbase: Rush Towards Prosperity in Star Atlas Intensifies
Star Atlas published an article about the release of new mining ships.
#7 | NO MORE ESCAPE VELOCITY!!! | Star Atlas
Pathfinder posted a video of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas summary Brew 67 Great episode
OCG Thor posted a video on his thoughts related to a Star Atlas Brew.
New Star Atlas State of the Economy Report Highlights Liberalization of Player Resource Economy
Star Atlas published their quarterly economy report.
